select `categories`.`id` as `category_id`, `category_translations`.`name` from `category_translations` inner join `categories` on `categories`.`id` = `category_translations`.`category_id` where `category_translations`.`locale` = 'en' order by `category_translations`.`name` asc
select count(*) as aggregate from `seller_store_products` where `seller_id` = 3

select count(*) as aggregate from `seller_store_products` as `ssp` inner join `product_flat` as `pf` on `ssp`.`product_id` = `pf`.`product_id` where `ssp`.`seller_id` = 3 and `pf`.`locale` = 'en' and `pf`.`channel` = 'default'

select `ssp`.`id` as `ssp_id`, `ssp`.`product_id`, `ssp`.`commission_percent`, `ssp`.`is_recommended`, `pf`.`sku`, `pf`.`name`, `pf`.`type`, `pf`.`status`, `pf`.`price` from `seller_store_products` as `ssp` inner join `product_flat` as `pf` on `ssp`.`product_id` = `pf`.`product_id` where `ssp`.`seller_id` = 3 and `pf`.`locale` = 'en' and `pf`.`channel` = 'default' limit 10 offset 0
